name: gitlab-mcp
description: Provides full GitLab API access via Model Context Protocol — repos, pipelines, merge requests, issues, and more.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List GitLab projects accessible to the authenticated user

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get details of a specific GitLab project by ID or path

tools.name: search_projects
tools.description: Search for GitLab projects by name or keyword

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get the contents of a file from a GitLab repository

tools.name: create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create a new file or update an existing file in a GitLab repository

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a GitLab project

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a GitLab project

tools.name: list_merge_requests
tools.description: List merge requests in a GitLab project

tools.name: get_merge_request
tools.description: Get details of a specific merge request

tools.name: create_merge_request
tools.description: Create a new merge request in a GitLab project

tools.name: merge_merge_request
tools.description: Merge an existing merge request

tools.name: update_merge_request
tools.description: Update an existing merge request

tools.name: list_pipelines
tools.description: List CI/CD pipelines in a GitLab project

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Get details of a specific pipeline

tools.name: list_pipeline_jobs
tools.description: List jobs in a specific pipeline

tools.name: get_pipeline_job_log
tools.description: Get the log output of a specific pipeline job

tools.name: retry_pipeline
tools.description: Retry a failed pipeline

tools.name: cancel_pipeline
tools.description: Cancel a running pipeline

tools.name: trigger_pipeline
tools.description: Trigger a new pipeline run

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitLab project

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get details of a specific issue

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitLab project

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue

tools.name: list_issue_notes
tools.description: List notes/comments on an issue

tools.name: create_issue_note
tools.description: Add a note/comment to an issue

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List labels in a GitLab project

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Create a new label in a GitLab project

tools.name: list_milestones
tools.description: List milestones in a GitLab project
